summary: Tested new features for Koora Voice app: Match Detail Page, Stories APIs, and PWA Notifications in Settings. All backend APIs passed (12/12 tests). Frontend features verified: Match Detail Page with 4 tabs (التشكيلة/الإحصائيات/الأحداث/المواجهات), Settings page with push notification enable button.

issues: Lineups/Stats/Events tabs show empty content for scheduled matches (expected behavior - data not available yet)

backend_apis: /api/football/match/{id} - Returns match data with lineups, statistics, events, h2h
/api/stories/{id}/react - Requires auth, returns 404 for non-existent story
/api/stories/{id}/reply - Requires auth, returns 404 for non-existent story
/api/stories/{id}/replies - Requires auth, returns 404 for non-existent story
/api/football/matches - Returns list of matches from multiple leagues
match_detail_page: Match header shows team logos, names, score/time, venue
4 tabs present: التشكيلة (Lineups), الإحصائيات (Stats), الأحداث (Events), المواجهات (H2H)
H2H tab shows historical matches between teams
settings_notifications: Push notification enable button 'تفعيل' present at top of notifications page
تفعيل الإشعارات الفورية (Enable Push Notifications) section with description
General toggles: الإشعارات الفورية, إشعارات البريد
Activity toggles: الرسائل, الإعجابات, التعليقات, المتابعات, الإشارات
Koora Voice toggles: دعوات الغرف, البث المباشر, تذكير المباريات

critical_code_review_comments: Match Detail API has proper fallback data when API-Football key is not available or match data is missing
Stories APIs properly validate authentication and return appropriate error codes
Push notification requestPushPermission function in SettingsPage.js correctly handles browser notification API
MatchDetailPage.js properly handles loading states and missing data scenarios
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and live API
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) MatchDetailPage.js at /match/:matchId shows match details with 4 tabs (lineups, stats, events, h2h). API endpoint /api/football/match/{id} returns comprehensive match data with fallback for missing API data. 2) Stories APIs (/stories/{id}/react, /stories/{id}/reply, /stories/{id}/replies) require authentication and properly handle non-existent stories. 3) SettingsPage.js notifications section has push notification enable button with requestPushPermission function that uses browser Notification API.
